name: assistmem
description: Local indexer and keyword search for Cursor IDE, Copilot (VS Code), Cursor/Claude Code/Codex/Gemini CLI. No login.

scripts.desktop:prepare: mkdir -p src-tauri/resources && rm -rf src-tauri/resources/dist && cp -R dist src-tauri/resources/dist && chmod -R u+w src-tauri/resources/node_modules 2>/dev/null; rm -rf src-tauri/resources/node_modules && mkdir -p src-tauri/resources/node_modules && cp -R node_modules/better-sqlite3 src-tauri/resources/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && cp -R node_modules/bindings src-tauri/resources/node_modules/bindings && cp -R node_modules/file-uri-to-path src-tauri/resources/node_modules/file-uri-to-path && cp -R node_modules/commander src-tauri/resources/node_modules/commander && rm -rf src-tauri/resources/bundled-node && mkdir -p src-tauri/resources/bundled-node && node scripts/fetch-node.mjs
scripts.mac: npm run build && npm run desktop:prepare && npm run desktop:dev
scripts.mac:build: npm run build && npm run desktop:prepare && npm run desktop:build
scripts.mac:release: npm run build && npm run desktop:prepare && npx @tauri-apps/cli@latest build --target aarch64-apple-darwin --bundles app,dmg --no-sign --ci
